title: Very Exciting Collaboration Announcement with Erin Condren!
excerpt: I’ve got nothing but love for this amazing and inspiring lady. And I am beyond thrilled to let you in on the secret we have been keeping for some time. We’ve collaborated to launch a fresh and fun debut collection…
body: I’ve got nothing but love for this amazing and inspiring lady. And I am beyond thrilled to let you in on the secret we have been keeping for some time. We’ve collaborated to launch a fresh and fun debut collection of clear stamps! EEEK! Check out this little video. We cannot wait to see what you create.
